entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: The host plant affected by stem rot

entities.name: STEM ROT
entities.description: A soil-borne disease caused by Sclerotium rolfsii

entities.name: SCLEROTIUM ROLFSII
entities.description: A necrotrophic plant pathogenic fungus that causes stem rot

entities.name: GP3
entities.description: A weakly aggressive strain of Sclerotium rolfsii collected from China

entities.name: ZY
entities.description: A highly aggressive strain of Sclerotium rolfsii collected from China

entities.name: CHINA
entities.description: The country where S. rolfsii strains GP3 and ZY were collected

entities.name: AGGRESSIVENESS
entities.description: The degree of pathogenicity of S. rolfsii strains on peanut plants

entities.name: ARTIFICIAL INOCULATION TEST
entities.description: A test used to determine the aggressiveness of S. rolfsii strains

entities.name: DE-NOVO GENOME SEQUENCING
entities.description: The process of sequencing a genome from scratch to reveal genomic basis of traits

entities.name: PACBIO LONG READ TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: The sequencing technology used to sequence the genomes of S. rolfsii strains

entities.name: COMPARATIVE GENOMIC ANALYSIS
entities.description: The analysis used to compare the genomes of different S. rolfsii strains

entities.name: PATHOGENICITY-RELATED GENE REPERTOIRES
entities.description: The collection of genes associated with the ability of a pathogen to cause disease

entities.name: PATHOGEN-HOST INTERACTION GENES
entities.description: Genes involved in the interaction between the pathogen and its host

entities.name: CARBOHYDRATE-ACTIVE ENZYMES
entities.description: Enzymes that break down carbohydrates, found in the secretome of S. rolfsii

entities.name: GLYCOSIDE HYDROLASE FAMILY
entities.description: A specific family of carbohydrate-active enzymes

entities.name: CARBOHYDRATE ESTERASE FAMILY
entities.description: A specific family of carbohydrate-active enzymes

entities.name: POLYSACCHARIDE LYASE FAMILY
entities.description: A specific family of carbohydrate-active enzymes

entities.name: EFFECTOR CANDIDATES
entities.description: Putative proteins secreted by the pathogen to manipulate the host

entities.name: SECONDARY METABOLITE SYNTHETIC GENE CLUSTERS
entities.description: Groups of genes responsible for the synthesis of secondary metabolites

entities.name: OXALIC ACID PRODUCTION
entities.description: The production of oxalic acid by S. rolfsii

entities.name: GROWTH RATE
entities.description: The speed of growth of S. rolfsii strains
